actionUnits.condition: EventTrigger (MonoBehaviour id=1647098183, eventID=4 PointerClick) has a persistent call to the Government script (MonoBehaviour id=1647098181, guid=ed3b45ff7bbab2146bc55b624801e08e) method 'showlabel'. This manual trigger directly invokes the same public no-arg method to ensure the event is executed. Expected: Player->child[1] TextMeshPro text becomes first 20 chars of 'Government:Police Department' (i.e., 'Government:Police De').

Expected: Player child[1] TextMeshPro text becomes the first 20 chars of 'Government:Police Department' => 'Government:Police De'.
